Last updated: August 2nd, 2024 at 09:02 UTC+02:00

SamMobile has affiliate and sponsored partnerships,we may earn a commission.

Reading time: 2 minutes

According to anew reportfrom The Chosun Daily, the Chairman ofSamsung Electronics,Lee Jae-Yong, the Chairman of Hyundai Motor Group, Chung Eui-Sun, and the CEO of Tesla Motors, Elon Musk, are going to meet for dinner this weekend in Paris.Reportedly, the bosses of the three companies are visiting France during the 2024 Summer Olympic Games, and at the meeting, they could discuss next-generation technologies, mostly related to electric vehicle (EV) batteries, and explore cooperation.The meeting could be about Samsung supplying solid-state or 4680 batteries to Hyundai and TeslaSamsung SDIis working hard to start the mass production of solid-state batteries for EVsby 2027. These batteries can offer a longer range, a faster charging speed, and longer life compared to lithium-ion batteries in EVs. It is possible that the meeting could be about Samsung supplying solid-state batteries to Hyundai and Tesla to help them stay ahead of others in the EV market.The story continues after the video…Samsung SDI is also developing a cylindrical battery with a diameter of 46mm and a length of 80mm, which are the same dimensions as the battery that Tesla uses in its electric vehicles. So, it is possible that the South Korean tech giant could propose to supply those batteries as well to Hyundai and Tesla. But that’s just our speculation. Hopefully, we will get more details after the meeting.

I’m a computer science engineer living in Hyderabad, India, who has a keen interest in automobiles and consumer electronics. My journalism career kicked off in 2017 with MySmartPrice where I wrote news, features, buying guides, and explanatory articles about technology among other things, and reviewed many products, including smartphones, tablets, laptops, PC components, smartwatches, audio devices, wearables, and smart home products. Since then, I have worked for 91Mobiles, Apple, and Onsitego, before finally landing on SamMobile.

title: Samsung, Hyundai, Tesla bosses to meet during Paris Olympics - SamMobile
author: Abid Iqbal Shaik
description: A new report from South Korea claims that the bosses of Samsung, Hyundai, and Tesla could meet during the Paris Olympics to discuss business. - SamMobile
